data.title: CF & CFRP Market projected to reach $35.55 billion by 2030 according to MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: On July 4, 2025 in Delray Beach, Florida, a study regarding the CF & CFRP Market highlighted various aspects such as precursor type (PAN, Pitch), source, resin type, and manufacturing processes including Lay-Up, Compression Molding, Resin Transfer Molding, Filament Winding, Injection Molding, and Pultrusion. The report also covered details on the end-use industry and regional insights. This analysis encompassed a range of numbers, statistics, and trends within the industry, offering a comprehensive overview of the CF & CFRP market landscape.

data.title: Investors of Phoenix FIRE claim exit scam as owner moves to dismiss lawsuit over crypto project takeover.
data.description: Daniel Ianello has filed a request with a Tennessee court to have a lawsuit dropped that alleges he was involved in a scam following his acquisition of The Phoenix crypto project.

data.title: Global fusion energy market report released by ResearchAndMarkets.com, covering 2025-2034. Highlights regulatory impact, patent analysis, start-up landscape.
data.description: The "Fusion Energy Market - A Global and Regional Analysis" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, offering insights from 2025 to 2034. This market analysis focuses on applications, technology, fuel cycle, and countries involved. The global fusion energy market is witnessing significant activity with key players including large international collaborations, government-supported research groups, and private enterprises. The emphasis is on magnetic confinement technologies such as tokamaks, with a growing interest in this sector.

data.title: Partners Value Investments L.P. announces ten-for-one unit split for outstanding equity units on TSXV, July 04, 2025.
data.description: Partners Value Investments L.P. (TSXV: PVF.UN, TSXV: PVF.PR.U) and Partners Value Investments Inc. (TSXV: PVF.WT, PVF.PR.V, PVF.A) disclosed a significant development on July 4, 2025. The board of trustees of the general partner of the Partnership sanctioned a ten-for-one unit split of the existing Equity Units (PVF.UN), leading to an increased number of outstanding units. This move aims to enhance the accessibility and liquidity of the Partnership's equity offerings in the market.

data.title: NAIPO & MaxKare offer up to 75% off at Walmart Deals from July 8-13. Summer essentials on big discount!
data.description: In Newark, New Jersey, the popular Walmart Deals event is returning this July. From July 8 to 13, shoppers can enjoy significant discounts on essential summer items from trusted brands NAIPO and MaxKare. The sale offers discounts of up to 75%, making it a great opportunity for customers to save big on their favorite products.

data.title: Amber International secures $25.5M to boost $100M crypto ecosystem fund, expand services in U.S. and Southeast Asia.
data.description: Amber International Holding Ltd. announced plans to utilize the $25.5 million raised through a private placement to bolster its $100 million "crypto ecosystem reserve." The company also intends to enhance its institutional crypto services in the U.S. and Southeast Asia. The placement on NASDAQ: AMBR seeks to expand its presence and offerings in key markets.

data.title: Bitcoin could surge to $150K soon due to Trump's 'Big Beautiful Bill'. Historically, Bitcoin sees significant gains after US debt bills. Will 2025 repeat this trend?
data.description: After the introduction of significant US debt-expanding bills, Bitcoin has consistently shown remarkable double-digit growth in the subsequent weeks. The question arises whether this trend will continue in 2025.

data.title: Home hydroponics market to reach $3.77 billion by 2030, growing at a 16.0% CAGR from 2025, per MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on July 4, 2025, the market for home hydroponics is valued at approximately $1.80 billion this year and is forecasted to grow to around $3.77 billion by 2030, displaying a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 16.0% during the period from 2025 to 2030. These figures come from a report released by MarketsandMarkets™. The popularity and adoption of home hydroponics systems are on the rise, indicating a significant market expansion in the coming years.

data.title: North America sees uptrend in electronic tools for CVs, expect cloud-based systems, automation and customization by 2030.
data.description: A report titled "Medium and Heavy-duty Commercial Vehicle (CV) Electronic Service Tools (EST) Market, North America, 2025-2030" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The North American market for medium and heavy-duty commercial vehicle electronic service tools is on a steady growth trajectory. This growth is fueled by various industry factors including advancements in vehicle complexity, an increasing emphasis on vehicle efficiency and fuel economy. The market is projected to experience gradual and sustained growth from 2025 to 2030.
